narrative:
Hinckley TWP township has 6,514 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.0 percentage points.
